title: What range will US housing starts for April 2026 fall into (released May 2026)?
context: If US housing starts for April 2026 is above 1.400M, then the market resolves to Yes.

source.rules: If US housing starts for April 2026 is above 1.400M, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: What range will Germany's Q1 2026 GDP growth (QoQ, flash estimate) fall into?
context:
If Germany GDP growth rate QoQ for Q1 2026 is above 

-0.4

, then the market resolves to Yes.

metadata.original_title: Germany GDP growth rate QoQ for Q1 2026

source.rules:

title: What will US CPI year-over-year be for May 2026 (released June 10, 2026)?
context: If the CPI year-over-year is exactly 2.0% in May 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

source.rules: If the CPI year-over-year is exactly 2.0% in May 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: What will US core CPI month-over-month be for May 2026?
context: If the CPI core month-over-month is exactly -0.2% in May 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

source.rules: If the CPI core month-over-month is exactly -0.2% in May 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: What rate action will the Bank of Japan take at its June 2026 Monetary Policy Meeting?
context: If the Bank of Japan takes the action of Cut more than 25bps at June 2026 Monetary Policy Meeting, then the market resolves to Yes.

metadata.original_title: Bank of Japan rate decision in June

source.rules: If the Bank of Japan takes the action of Cut more than 25bps at June 2026 Monetary Policy Meeting, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: What rate action will the Reserve Bank of Australia take at its June 2026 board meeting?

source.rules: If the Reserve Bank of Australia takes the action of Cut more than 25bps at June Reserve Bank of Australia Monetary Policy Board meeting, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Where will the US Treasury 10-year par yield close on June 30, 2026 (end of Q2)?
context: If U.S. Treasury Daily Yield Curve Rate (10 Yr) for June 30, 2026 (end of Q2 2026) is above 3.60%, then the market resolves to Yes.

metadata.original_title: UST par yield curve (10Y) at end of Q2 2026?

source.rules: If U.S. Treasury Daily Yield Curve Rate (10 Yr) for June 30, 2026 (end of Q2 2026) is above 3.60%, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: What will US core CPI year-over-year be for June 2026?
context: If the CPI core year-over-year is exactly 2.2% in Jun 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

source.rules: If the CPI core year-over-year is exactly 2.2% in Jun 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: What will US CPI month-over-month be for June 2026?
context: If the CPI month-over-month is exactly -0.2% in Jun 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

source.rules: If the CPI month-over-month is exactly -0.2% in Jun 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: What rate action will the Bank of Canada take at its July 15, 2026 meeting?
context: If the Bank of Canada does a Cut of >25bps at its Jul 15, 2026 meeting, then the market resolves to Yes.

metadata.original_title: Bank of Canada decision in July?

source.rules: If the Bank of Canada does a Cut of >25bps at its Jul 15, 2026 meeting, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Where will the upper bound of the US federal funds target rate sit after the September 2026 FOMC meeting?
context: If the upper bound of the target federal funds rate published on the Federal Reserve's official website is greater than 2.75% following the Federal Reserve's Sep 16, 2026 meeting, then the market resolves to Yes.

metadata.original_title: Fed funds rate after September meeting?

source.rules: If the upper bound of the target federal funds rate published on the Federal Reserve's official website is greater than 2.75% following the Federal Reserve's Sep 16, 2026 meeting, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: What will the AAA US average regular gas price be on November 3, 2026 (Election Day)?
context: If average regular gas prices for the United States are strictly greater than $2.50 on Nov 3, 2026 according to AAA, then the market resolves to Yes.

metadata.original_title: US gas prices on Election Day

source.rules: If average regular gas prices for the United States are strictly greater than $2.50 on Nov 3, 2026 according to AAA, then the market resolves to Yes.
